description_long: This object consists of two adjacent modern gravestones, each featuring a rectangular black stone base and a vertical black stone slab as the main headstone. Each headstone is accented by a tall, narrow, light gray marble or granite strip that runs vertically along one side, providing a striking contrast to the dark stone. The bases are tiered, with a slightly raised platform supporting a polished, lighter stone slab, likely intended as a grave cover. The overall design is minimalist and geometric, with clean lines and a contemporary aesthetic. There are no visible inscriptions, engravings, or decorative motifs on the surfaces, and the object appears to be constructed entirely from stone materials.
description: A pair of modern, rectangular gravestones with black stone bases and vertical slabs, each accented by a tall, light gray marble strip. The design is minimalist, with clean lines and no visible inscriptions.
description_view_0: Front view showing both gravestones side by side, highlighting the vertical light gray marble strips and the polished stone grave covers.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thickness of the headstones and the layered structure of the bases.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain backs of the headstones and the continuation of the marble strips.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the thickness and layered base, with the marble strips visible on the far side.
